task.title: Fix switchWorkspace clawName bug and related workspace config issues

raw.question: Use normalized workspace label for clawName/default updates
raw.chosen: Use normalized workspace label for clawName/default updates
raw.reasoning: Keeps .env claw name and default workspace consistent whether the entry has an alias, workspace ID, or only an API key

retrospective.summary: Fixed switchWorkspace clawName sync, refreshed stale default aliases, and warned on corrupt workspace JSON
